scores.justification: Discrete-adjoint layer validated against central finite differences of the full independent pipeline with mutation tests (sign/conjugation/dropped-term rejection); the variational-stationarity collapse is confirmed numerically rather than assumed; the credential's oracle-first tripwire protocol carries over; two-tier honesty structure is rigorous by design.

scores.fix: Add one multi-parameter or RF-observable (driven-column) optimization exercise, or a second geometry, before the capability claim scores at full weight.
scores.justification: Optimization demonstrations are single-parameter by design; the real-device convergence is a within-budget 0.5%-move demonstration target; the driven column is validated at operator level only. Claims are honestly bounded to match, but the design-capability evidence is deliberately narrow.

Five contributions bulleted one sentence per item; ~250-word abstract leads with the inverse-design gap and states capability, honest negatives, credential, and the LOM/eigenmode boundary — extractable on triage.

Substrate-backed per the .4.litsearch sibling (8 resolver-verified candidates, all merged or explicitly declined): QDO, the SQcircuit line (credited with solving lumped-level eigenpair gradients), SQuADDS, photonics genus anchor, JAX-FEM at CPC 2023, TensorGalerkin concurrency, libCEED foil all engaged on the merits; the wedge is hedged ('to our knowledge'). No close prior work for the reframed claim ignored.

SHA-256-pinned mesh, committed TOMLs/logs for every cell including the four new diffopt/quantum/roadmap artifacts, per-cell hardware+commit provenance including the 128 GB-box disclosure, pinning release tests named per artifact. Repo URL/DOI is an operator-gated TODO (submission blocker, not scored down per thread convention).

The v4 deduction is repaired: Table 3 carries both large-scale rows with a dagger protocol note and a completes-but-loses caption; new Figure 5 renders from the committed diffopt TOMLs with a self-contained caption carrying the affine disclosure and the 33x budget annotation; captions verified self-contained against the rendered PDF.

Structure follows the reframe spine cleanly; voice consistent; v4 overfull-hbox defects resolved (fresh compile: single 1.13 pt box, below the 5 pt gate); header/provenance updated; no broken cross-references or undefined citations at the compile fixpoint.

scores.fix: Quote eriksson2025automated verbatim ('time-consuming iterative electromagnetic simulations') or drop the quotation marks and paraphrase, as the abstract already does correctly.
scores.justification: All 57 cite keys resolve to complete entries (zero missing, zero unused) and the litsearch cautions are applied correctly, but section 1 presents an inexact quotation as verbatim: the quoted span drops 'iterative' from the cited abstract (verified against the live arXiv record for 2508.18027 this pass) — a one-word misquote of the closest prior work, which is also the outreach audience.

scores.fix: Compress the conclusion recap to 3-4 sentences, trim the Discussion's credential restatement, and compact the section 6.2 arc; the venue two-column layout is the remaining structural lever toward the ~15 pp single-column target.
scores.justification: Real compression happened (~35% on the old benchmark material while adding ~8 pp of contribution content; abstract now ~250 words), but the paper is 25 compiled single-column pages against the BRIEF's ~15-page-equivalent target and the conclusion re-walks the abstract and contribution list nearly item for item.

findings.rationale: The quoted span 'time-consuming electromagnetic simulations' is not verbatim from the cited eriksson2025automated abstract, which reads 'time-consuming iterative electromagnetic simulations'; an inexact quotation presented as verbatim is a scholarly-precision defect the cited authors (the outreach audience) would catch.
findings.suggested_fix: Quote verbatim or unquote to paraphrase (the abstract's own phrasing at L70-72 is the correct model).

findings.rationale: Five TODO(operator) markers (title wording, affiliations, cubecl f64 tracking URL, repo URL/DOI, acknowledgment/whiteroom) are operator-gated by thread convention but are each a hard arXiv-submission blocker.
findings.suggested_fix: Operator resolves all five before submission.

findings.rationale: 25 compiled single-column pages vs the BRIEF's 8-12 pp two-column (~15 single-column) target; residual restatement in the conclusion and Discussion.
findings.suggested_fix: Apply the compression levers listed in comments.md (conclusion recap, Discussion credential paragraph, section 6.2 arc, two-column layout).

findings.rationale: Anchor E_C appears as 0.2156 GHz (plate target) and 0.2155 GHz (pad anchor); both artifact-faithful but the unexplained proximity can read as a typo.
